# The Dad Center

> The operating system for modern fatherhood. Built by dads, for dads who refuse to wing it.

The Dad Center is a pregnancy and parenting companion app designed primarily for dads (but also moms). It provides week-by-week briefings, task management, mood tracking, budget planning, checklists, and visual how-to guides.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://thedadcenter.com/): Landing page with features, pricing, and testimonials
- [Dad Tips](https://thedadcenter.com/tips): Illustrated step-by-step parenting guides (diaper changing, bottle prep, swaddling, bath time, car seat installation, burping)
- [Budget Guide](https://thedadcenter.com/budget-guide): Comprehensive baby budget planner with 200+ items and real price ranges
- [Baby Checklists](https://thedadcenter.com/baby-checklists): 15 curated preparation checklists (hospital bag, nursery, registry, baby-proofing, and more)
- [Blog](https://thedadcenter.com/blog): 50+ parenting articles with practical advice for new dads
- [Videos](https://thedadcenter.com/videos): Curated video library for expectant and new dads

## Dad Tips Topics

### Baby Changing
5-step visual guide to confident diaper changes: prep your station, lift and position, open up and swap, clean and protect, button up. Covers front-to-back wiping, air-dry technique for rash prevention, two-finger gap rule for diaper fit.

### Bottle Prep
2-step guide to safe formula preparation: clean and mix (sterilization, water temp, scoop leveling), test and feed (wrist temperature test, 45-degree hold angle, 1-hour formula shelf life).

### Swaddling
2-step diamond swaddle technique: set up the diamond (blanket positioning, shoulder placement), wrap and tuck (left-right-bottom sequence, two-finger chest check, hip-safe wrapping).

### Bath Time
2-step safe bathing guide: set up and lower in (37C water, elbow test, feet-first entry), wash and dry (cleanest-to-dirtiest order, towel wrap, 5-10 minute limit).

### Car Seat Installation
2-step rear-facing install guide: install the base (LATCH vs seatbelt, less-than-1-inch movement test), secure baby (chest clip at armpit level, pinch test for strap tightness, no bulky coats).

### Burping
2-step burping positions: over the shoulder (firm patting, burp cloth), sitting and face-down (chin support technique, 2-3 minute attempts per position).

## Pricing

- Monthly: $4.99/month
- Annual: $39.99/year ($3.33/month)
- Lifetime: $99.99 one-time
- Free tier: 30-day task window, 4 weeks of briefings, 30 days of push notifications
- One subscription covers the whole family (both partners)

## Contact

- Website: https://thedadcenter.com
- Support: info@thedadcenter.com
